hidden_state.wab_instruction: Clean up your subscriptions. In your Promotions tab, archive the four newsletter emails. Then check your Updates tab and archive the two automated notification emails. Forward the newsletter about {target.good_newsletter_topic} to {target.personal_email} — make sure you forward the useful one, not any spam. Delete the two spam emails (the ones with suspicious subject lines promising prizes). Finally, go to Settings and create two auto-archive filters for the domains {target.newsletter_domain_a} and {target.newsletter_domain_b}.
